title: DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet (DLSA Siddipet)
short_info: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet (DLSA Siddipet) Recruitment 2026: District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet has released the official notification for 1 Junior Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 34 years Age Relaxation: OC: 5 years, SCs/STs/BCs/EWS/Aboriginal Tribes in Agency areas/BCs: 10 years, Differently-abled: 10 years, Ex-Servicemen: as per Rule 12(1)(c)(i) of Telangana State and Subordinate Service Rules, Contract/Outsourcing employees in DLSA Siddipet: further 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Arts or Science or Commerce or Law, Knowledge or qualification in computer operation
qualification.details: Must have passed Degree in Arts or Science or Commerce or Law of a University in India established or incorporated by or a central Act, Provisional Act or a State Act or from any Institution recognized by the University Grants Commission or any other degree equivalent to such qualification. Must have knowledge or qualification in computer operation.

selection_process: OMR based examination (80 marks: 40 GK + 40 General English
90 minutes) Oral Interview (Viva-Voce) (20 marks) Certificate Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: siddipet.dcourts.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DLSA Siddipet Junior Assistant recruitment is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Arts, Science, Commerce, or Law from a recognized university and have knowledge or qualification in computer operation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Assistant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Junior Assistant post is between 18 years and 34 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Assistant post announced by the District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 800/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 400/- for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Junior Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes an OMR-based examination, an oral interview (Viva-Voce), and certificate verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the starting date to apply for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The application submission starts on 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the District Legal Services Authority, Siddipet.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for DLSA Siddipet?
faq.answer: The official website for DLSA Siddipet is http://ecourts.gov.in/Siddipet.
